# How Much Does Skilljar Cost: A Detailed Pricing Guide

4 mins Read

![How Much Does Skilljar Cost: A Detailed Pricing Guide](https://softwarefinder.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsoftware-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com%2Fhow_much_does_skilljar_cost_d7cde6d05e.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Table Of Contents

Last Updated Feb 09, 2026

[![ashar](https://softwarefinder.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsoftware-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com%2Fashar_a73c13ccc8.avif&w=96&q=75)\\
\\
Written by\\
\\
Ashar Ahmad](https://softwarefinder.com/author/ashar)

- [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashar-farooqi/)

[![Ali Gohar](https://softwarefinder.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsoftware-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com%2FAli_Gohar_6b2a269053.jpeg&w=96&q=75)\\
\\
Reviewed by\\
\\
Ali Gohar](https://softwarefinder.com/author/ali-g)

- [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/aligohar08/)

![Header-image-skilljar-logo.avif](https://software-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com/Header_image_skilljar_logo_093b863630.avif)

Ever wondered why some companies effortlessly onboard customers while others struggle with endless support tickets? The secret often lies in having the right customer education platform. If you're considering [Skilljar](https://softwarefinder.com/lms/skilljar) for your customer training needs, you're probably wondering how much it costs. While pricing isn't publicly listed, Skilljar uses a flexible model based on your company's size, training requirements, and specific needs.

This guide will help you learn how much does Skilljar costs with a complete pricing breakdown and the features it offers.

## **Understanding Skilljar Pricing Model**

Skilljar uses a two-component pricing model that keeps costs aligned with your usage:

- **Annual Subscription Plan:** Covers your training platform and core features
- **Active User Fees:** Based on the number of active users engaging with your content in one year

This structure makes pricing flexible depending on your organization's size and training demands. Beyond the ongoing subscription and user fees, you'll also need to budget for initial setup costs.

## **Implementation Cost: What To Expect?**

Implementation costs can range widely depending on your organization's complexity and needs. For small businesses, a basic setup might cost around $3,000 to $5,000. Midsize companies should expect costs between $5,000 to $15,000, while large enterprises with complex integration needs often exceed $20,000. These costs cover platform configuration, initial training, and onboarding support to ensure smooth deployment.

_Disclaimer: The pricing has been sourced from third-party websites and is subject to change._

## **Skilljar Pricing Plans: Detailed Breakdown**

![IMAGE-1-Pricing-Plan.avif](https://software-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com/IMAGE_1_Pricing_Plan_1d67690890.avif)

Skilljar offers Essential, Professional, and Enterprise plans, each with custom pricing tailored to the number of active users and specific required features. While exact costs are available only through quotes, here's how the plans differ and who they serve best.

### **Skilljar Essential Plan: Getting Started**

**Best for:** Small businesses launching their first customer education program

The Essential plan provides core functionality for organizations beginning their training journey. It includes everything needed to create effective learning experiences without overwhelming complexity.

**Key Features:**

- Single academy site with custom themes
- Unlimited courses and learner seats
- Low-code page builder for content creation
- Standard platform integrations
- REST API access
- Learner single sign-on (SSO)
- Virtual instructor-led training
- Certificate issuance
- Automated learner communications
- Custom reporting and benchmarks

### **Skilljar Professional Plan: Scaling Up**

**Best for:** Growing organizations managing multiple training audiences and complex learning ecosystems

The Professional plan builds on the Essential plan with enhanced capabilities for companies ready to expand their training reach and sophistication.

**Key Features:**

- Everything in the Essential plan, plus:
- Two academy sites with custom themes
- Premium platform integrations
- Admin single sign-on (SSO)
- Content syndication to external LMS platforms
- Advanced external management tools

### **Skilljar Enterprise Plan: Full-Scale Training**

**Best for:** Large organizations training customers, partners, and employees at scale

Enterprise plan provides comprehensive tools and infrastructure for managing high-volume, complex training programs across multiple audiences.

**Key Features:**

- Everything in Professional plan, plus:
- Three academy sites with custom themes
- Extended premium integrations
- Advanced external management capabilities

### **Add-On Options For Specialized Needs**

![IMAGE-2-text-and-icons.avif](https://software-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com/IMAGE_2_text_and_icons_4865301b6c.avif)

The platform offers several add-ons to extend platform capabilities:

#### **Content Syndication**

Distribute courses to external learning platforms, letting learners access content within their existing LMS environment

**Price:** $10,000

#### **Data Connector**

Real-time access to Skilljar data through a dedicated PostgreSQL database for advanced analytics and reporting

**Price:** Starting at $25,000

#### **Language Packs**

Localize your platform for global audiences with multi-language content support

**Price:** Starting at $10,000 (for 5 languages)

#### **LearnExpert Integration**

AI-powered course creation tools that publish directly to Skilljar

**Price:** Custom pricing

## **Skilljar Demo: Key Features**

![IMAGE-3-text-and-icons.avif](https://software-finder-prod.blr1.digitaloceanspaces.com/IMAGE_3_text_and_icons_215489c19a.avif)

Skilljar provides a thorough demo experience that highlights its key features. Here are some standout capabilities you can explore:

### **Customizable Learning Paths**

Build personalized learning journeys based on user roles and subscription levels, increasing engagement and knowledge retention.

### **Certifications And LinkedIn Integration**

Learners can display earned certificates on their LinkedIn profiles, boosting both their credibility and your brand's visibility.

### **Seamless Instructor-Led Training**

Integrated with [Zoom](https://softwarefinder.com/project-management-software/zoom) and [Cisco Webex](https://softwarefinder.com/marketing-software/webex) for live sessions, Skilljar supports easy registration, calendar syncing, and session tracking.

### **Monetized Trainings**

Turn training into a revenue stream with support for subscriptions, course bundles, and training credits.

### **Key Integrations**

Connect with platforms like [Salesforce Engage software,](https://softwarefinder.com/crm/salesforce) Google Analytics, and more to enhance the learner experience and track outcomes.

## **Final Words: Get Your Custom Quote Today**

Ready to see how Skilljar fits your training needs and budget? Request a personalized demo to explore features and receive a custom pricing quote tailored to your organization's needs.

Typical price after negotiations Sign up or login to unlock Skilljar: EssentialsNew purchase, 1 year term Subscription - REST APIs Included Standard Success Included Price after negotiations- [Get a customized estimate](https://www.vendr.com/marketplace/skilljar#price-calculator) ### Professional Empowers teams to train diverse audiences or monetize courses with dual Academy sites, premium integrations, admin SSO, content syndication, and external management. ​ Typical price after negotiations Sign up or login to unlock Skilljar: ProfessionalNew purchase, 1 year term Subscription - REST APIs Included Standard Success Plan Included Price after negotiations- [Get a customized estimate](https://www.vendr.com/marketplace/skilljar#price-calculator) ### Enterprise Offers an enterprise-grade LMS for scalable customer education, featuring 3 branded academies, premium integrations, and external management tools. ## Skilljar price negotiation FAQs ### What's the real cost difference between Skilljar's tiers, and when does upgrading to Professional make financial sense? Vendr's data reveals a significant pricing gap that isn't immediately obvious from Skilljar's marketing materials. Professional tier with 10,000 MAUs costs $85,800 (negotiable down to $52,681-$62,033), while Essentials with 5,000 MAUs runs $50,500 (negotiable to $34,189-$40,451). The effective 'upgrade cost' is $35,300 list price, but only $18,492-$21,582 after typical negotiations. Here's the critical insight: Professional tier discounts are consistently 8-12 percentage points higher than Essentials. Professional customers achieve 18-39% discounts versus Essentials' 9-32% range. This means the real upgrade cost can be as low as $18,500 annually - just $1,540 per month for significantly enhanced capabilities including dual Academy sites, premium integrations, and admin SSO. ### How much can I save by bundling add-ons with my Skilljar Essentials subscription, and which combinations offer the best value? Based on Vendr's pricing intelligence, bundling add-ons with Skilljar Essentials can yield significant savings compared to purchasing them separately post-contract. For a typical 1,000 MAU Essentials deployment ($30,100 list price), adding Custom Domains and Five Language Packs increases the total to $43,940 - but our data shows you can negotiate this bundle down to approximately $30,318-$35,855 (31-18% discount range). The key insight from Vendr's data: Skilljar is more flexible on add-on pricing when bundled during initial negotiations rather than added later. Custom Domains ($6,000 list) and Language Packs ($7,840 list) together represent a 46% premium over the base subscription, but bundling them upfront typically reduces this premium to 15-25%. ### What's the optimal MAU volume for negotiating Skilljar pricing, and how do per-user costs scale? Vendr's usage data reveals critical pricing inflection points that dramatically impact per-MAU costs. Essentials pricing shows optimal negotiation leverage at 2,500-5,000 MAU volumes. At 1,000 MAUs ($30,100 list), per-user cost is $30.10, negotiating down to $22.76-$26.37. At 5,000 MAUs ($50,500 list), per-user cost drops to $10.10 list, $6.84-$9.22 negotiated. The key insight: Skilljar's pricing model heavily favors volume commitments, but the discount curves flatten above 10,000 MAUs. ### What's the real cost of Skilljar's Premier Success add-on, and how can I negotiate better support without paying full price? Premier Success pricing varies significantly by tier, and Vendr's data reveals it's one of Skilljar's most negotiable add-ons. For Essentials customers, Premier Success adds $2,700 annually (list price), bringing a 1,000 MAU deployment from $30,100 to $32,800. However, our data shows this bundled price negotiates down to $24,206-$28,339 (26-14% discount range). The critical insight: Premier Success discounts often exceed base subscription discounts. While the add-on represents only 9% of total contract value, it frequently drives 5-8 additional percentage points of overall discount. ### How do Skilljar's add-on costs compare to competitors, and what's my negotiation leverage? Vendr's competitive intelligence shows Skilljar's add-on pricing is 15-30% higher than comparable LMS platforms, creating significant negotiation leverage. The Data Connector ($12,000 annually) and Language Packs ($7,840) are particularly overpriced relative to market alternatives. For Professional tier customers adding both features, the total premium is $34,100 - increasing a $85,800 base contract to $119,900. However, our data reveals these add-ons have the highest discount elasticity. Professional customers with Data Connector and Language Packs achieve 25-43% total discounts ($68,703-$90,285 final pricing), compared to 18-39% on base subscriptions alone. ### How should I structure a multi-year Skilljar contract to maximize savings, and what's the real discount impact? Vendr's data shows multi-year Skilljar contracts unlock substantially better pricing, but the structure matters enormously. A 3-year Essentials contract with 2,500 MAUs ($113,250 total) can be negotiated down to $66,025-$77,576 (23-42% discount range). This represents $35,674-$47,225 in total savings over the contract term. The key insight: Skilljar's discount curves steepen significantly at 24+ month commitments. While 12-month contracts typically max out at 15-25% discounts, 36-month deals regularly achieve 30-42% reductions. The annual equivalent pricing drops from $37,750 list to $22,008-$25,859 negotiated - a potential $11,891-$15,742 annual savings. ## Which companies have similar products as Skilljar?
